subject: Young humanoid with light hair in dark jacket holding a sword
description: A young male-presenting humanoid figure with light-colored hair stands in a composed but ready posture, holding a sword. The outfit is dark — dark jacket, light undershirt. The figure is rendered in a three-quarter pose, sword held across the body or at the side. Energy effects are present but understated compared to the SD3-03 variant — the mood here is more controlled readiness than full-force attack. The background is a neutral energy field.
foreground: Young fighter with light hair, dark outfit, sword held in ready position
